name: Brian Setzer
abstract: Brian Robert Setzer (born April 10, 1959) is an American guitarist, singer, and songwriter. He found widespread success in the early 1980s with the 1950s-style rockabilly group Stray Cats, and returned to the music scene in the early 1990s with his swing revival band, the Brian Setzer Orchestra.

about_quotes.speaker: Dave Bennett
about_quotes.evidence: You had Big Bad Voodoo Daddy, Brian Setzer, Royal Crown Revue. So all of a sudden I saw these young people getting into this music that I had been into for the prior few years.
about_quotes.doc_title: Dave Bennett interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, April 16, 2025
